description: Python application where yaml.load() call exists only in commented-out deprecated code. Only yaml.safe_load() is actively called. CVE-2020-1747 is not exploitable.

provenance.ground_truth_notes: app.py imports yaml and uses yaml.safe_load(). The yaml.load() call only exists in a commented-out deprecated code block that the static analyzer cannot reach.

findings.human_justification: yaml.load() only appears in commented-out code. The active code path uses yaml.safe_load() exclusively, so the vulnerable function is unreachable.
